rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PAUL F. NEWTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 10, 2016. petitioner was directed to hire a genealogical researcher to locate heirs. the declaration filed states the researcher was hired to find a living first-degree relative and her declaration is captioned as such. further research is necessary and a new declaration must be filed showing the search was made to locate any heirs of the decedent, not just a living first-degree relative.
